lastModifiedDate.description: The datetime the workflow was last modified.

lastModifiedUser.description: This property is no longer available and will be removed from the documentation soon. See the [deprecation notice](https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/jira/platform/deprecation-notice-user-privacy-api-migration-guide/) for details.

lastModifiedUserAccountId.description: The account ID of the user that last modified the workflow.

scope.description: The scope where this workflow applies

steps.description: The number of steps included in the workflow.
